response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level Junior Java Developer role — a severe seniority mismatch that almost always leads to retention issues, salary mismatch, and disengagement. Java is listed but not a primary stack; core experience is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. German is only basic, which fails the strong German communication requirement for client-facing insurance work in Germany. No insurance domain exposure.
strengths: Strong CS fundamentals with degree and broad OOP experience across Java, C++, C#, and TypeScript
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Based in Berlin with experience in agile teams and cloud/Docker/Kubernetes exposure
concerns: Severe overqualification — staff/senior engineer applying for entry-level role
German is only Basic, but role explicitly requires strong verbal and written German
Java is peripheral in recent work; primary stacks are TypeScript and DLang, with no insurance-sector experience

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and OOP breadth
